candidate_llm_application: LLM chain-of-thought reconstruction from sampled outputs: trace branching reasoning paths via conjunctive errors (shared mistakes) and separative ones; recover the latent 'original' reasoning chain.

results.title: Self-Consistency Chain-Of-Thought: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on self-consistency chain-of-thought, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (self-consistency chain-of-thought); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (philology terms vs LLM terms).
